Scenario: Verify Existing Account Billing Address and Payment Terms
Expected Result: Account Details tab displays BillingAddress and a Payment Terms field; emit console warning and continue if either is blank (soft fail)

Scenario: Create Contact on Account from the Contacts Related List
Expected Result: New Contact (Sand Jose) is saved and the browser navigates to a URL containing `/Contact/`; contactUrl state is stored for downstream tests

Scenario: Create Opportunity from Contact and Verify Primary Contact Role
Expected Result: Opportunity created via the Contact's Opportunities related list; browser URL contains `/Opportunity/`; the Contact's full name appears in the Contact Roles related list on the Opportunity

Scenario: Create Quote from Opportunity, Browse Catalogs, Select Price Book, Add Product, Validate Cart
Expected Result: Quote saved from Opportunity; Browse Catalogs → Standard Price Book selected → All Products → first available product added; at least one cart row is visible after save

Scenario: Quote Acceptance → Contract Creation & Activation → Order Creation & Activation
Expected Result: Quote set to Accepted; Contract created (None — no prices/discounts) and activated with 12-month term; Order created via Create single Order and Activated; Order Status is Activated/Completed
